title: Full case statement with default entry creates $dlatch

features.name: full case with redundant default branch
features.description: Code should include a case statement where all possible values of the selector are explicitly enumerated AND a default branch is also present, triggering incorrect latch inference

features.name: don't-care assignment in case default
features.description: Code should include a case default branch that assigns the don't-care value 1'bx to a signal, which in combination with a fully-enumerated case causes incorrect synthesis behavior
